name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Embracing the duality of chaos and order, I seek balance in all aspects of life.
speech_style: Smooth and Precise, like a katana's strike

name: Luna Luminari
bio: As a beacon in the darkness, I strive to shed light on the mysteries of existence.
speech_style: Luminous whispers, guiding truth to those who seek it

name: Taro Torii
bio: As a guardian of the land, I am committed to preserving the natural balance and harmony.
speech_style: Rugged and direct, like a tree's roots digging deep into the earth

name: Akira Akiyama
bio: In my view, human destiny is predetermined by the laws of nature. We must adapt to the world as it is, not try to change its fundamental course.
speech_style: Methodical and precise, with a tendency to emphasize the logical conclusion of an argument.
